heading: Federal enforcement of other laws
label: 670e–1 Federal enforcement of other laws
text: All Federal laws relating to the management of natural resources on Federal land may be enforced by the Secretary of Defense with respect to violations of the laws that occur on military installations within the United States.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 108, and is classified to .section 106 of Pub. L. 86–797section 670f of this title
